fields.funding_signal: Public Crunchbase and funding search pages did not expose accessible funding detail.
fields.job_post_signal: Public careers/search pages surface 113 open roles: Products, Core Platform, Security, Platform Security.
fields.layoff_signal: no layoffs.csv match found for Vercel
fields.leadership_change_signal: Public news/search pages mention leadership context: Perspectives Feb 5, 2026 Executive Function: Building systems that can make decisions without you COO Jeanne Grosser sits down with First Round Capital's Brett Berson to unpack what separates good executives from extraordinary ones.
fields.bench_match_summary: Bench match is guided by public signals from job_post_velocity, leadership_change, layoffs.
fields.competitor_gap_position: Prospect AI maturity is 2/3 against a reference top-quartile benchmark of 2.75. Current visible gap delta is 0.75.
fields.recommended_hook: Orrin Labs has no named AI/ML leadership role. CTO holds a combined infrastructure-and-data remit per the public team page. Public signals currently point to public news/search pages mention leadership context: perspectives feb 5, 2026 executive function: building systems that can make decisions without you coo jeanne grosser sits down with first round capital's brett berson to unpack what separates good executives from extraordinary ones.
